page_metadata.biotools__summary: A scoring function based on Gradient Boosting Trees algorithm for predicting ligand-protein binding affinity. PDBbind 2019v collection of the general and refined sets minus core set is used for training GB-Score and core set is used as an independent test set.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A scoring function based on Gradient Boosting Trees algorithm for predicting ligand-protein binding affinity. PDBbind 2019v collection of the general and refined sets minus core set is used for training GB-Score and core set is used as an independent test set.
